response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman but does not meet the core technical bar for this role. The JD requires 8 years of C++ and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus. The resume shows only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (~7 months, 2014-2015) and a bachelor thesis project. Primary expertise is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang for web/mobile/GIS work, not cloud compute platforms. No demonstrated technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers or production cloud architecture at the scale implied.
strengths: Long, varied engineering career with craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Some low-latency, high-throughput experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of req/s)
Mentoring and teaching track record (workshops, dojos, courses)
concerns: Far short of 8 years C++ — only a brief NI stint and academic project
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infrastructure leadership
No evidence of formal tech-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra leadership
Strong general engineering craftsmanship and mentoring
